title: Game-Theoretic Teaching
abstract: We present Game-Theoretic Teaching, a framework for analyzing and optimizing adaptive educational systems through the lens of game theory. We model teaching as a sequential game between teacher and student, where: (1) teacher selects teaching method from 15 options (Socratic, storytelling, visual, kinesthetic, etc.), (2) student selects learning strategy (attention depth, question frequency, engagement level), (3) payoff = learning outcome measured by retention and transf
comments: 25 pages, 10 figures, submitted to arXiv on 2026-03-15
